Instruction: Wait at the crosswalk, then cross the wide street, heading towards the brightly lit multi-story buildings on the other side. Once you reach the sidewalk, turn slightly left to walk along the paved path, keeping the buildings on your right. Walk past the building with the large, bright blue illuminated sign on its corner. Stop in front of the next establishment on your right, which features a red and black facade, large glass windows, and the Burger King logo above the entrance. This is your destination.
